dbEquipBonuses.name: Duergar Weapon Set (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: You and nearby allies are granted +2% Base Damage Boost, +2% Overall Outgoing Healing, +2% Incoming Damage reduction. May stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of similar weapons.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Fortified Vale (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set — Adventurer's Might: +5% role primary (DPS Power / Tank Defense / Healer Outgoing Healing). When you use an encounter power, 15% chance to increase a role-based Boost by 7.5% for 10s (DPS Recharge Speed / Tank Stamina Regen / Healer Action Point Gain).

dbEquipBonuses.name: Grand Alliance (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set — Brute's Expertise: When you are 25 feet or closer to your target, a stat dependent on your role and Forte is increased by 3% (DPS Power / Tank Awareness / Healer Outgoing Healing).

dbEquipBonuses.name: Meteoric Fury (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. Role bonus: DPS +2% Base Damage Boost, Tank -4% Incoming Damage, Healer +6% Overall Outgoing Healing. Does not stack. When in Wildspace, role bonus is doubled and Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Demonweb Empowerment (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 14%. Incoming damage is reduced by up to 7.5% when your Stamina is empty. At the start of Combat, Critical Strike and Critical Severity increase by 1%; for every 3s in combat these increase by 1% more (max +5%).

dbEquipBonuses.name: Dark Matter (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5.5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. Role bonus: DPS +1% Base Damage Boost, Tank -4% Incoming Damage, Healer +6% Overall Outgoing Healing. Does not stack. When in Wildspace, role bonus is doubled and Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Beholder Slayer (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 5% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. Role bonus to you and nearby allies: DPS +1% Base Damage Boost, Tank -2% Incoming Damage, Healer +2% Overall Outgoing Healing. May stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of similar weapons. When in the Underdark, your Damage is increased by 5%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Peer Into the Void (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Gain 3% Overall Outgoing Healing and -5% Incoming Damage. When in Wildspace, Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 2s in combat with a single opponent, you gain a stack of Darklight. Every 2s in combat with 4 or more opponents, you lose a stack.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Peer Into the Void (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Gain 3% Overall Outgoing Healing and -5% Incoming Damage. When in Wildspace, Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 2s in combat with a single opponent, you gain a stack of Darklight. Every 2s in combat with 4 or more opponents, you lose a stack.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Charging Bull
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you have been running for 1 second, you generate threat around you every second as long as you continue running.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Gift
dbEquipBonuses.description: Your current Hit Points increases your Outgoing Healing, up to a maximum of 6%.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Butcher's Precision
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1.5% Critical Severity for 10 seconds. (Max stack 5)
2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, gain a stack of Speedy Anointing, granting 2.5% Accuracy and 25% Recharge Speed for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.
